evals.prompt: Analyze all open issues in https://github.com/tobegit3hub/OxMate/issues and create a detailed summary issue with the analysis
evals.expected_output: A new issue is created in the OxMate repository containing a comprehensive analysis of all open issues including category breakdown, priority distribution, key themes, stale issues, and recommendations
expectations: Successfully lists all open issues from the repository
Analyzes issues by category (bugs, features, questions, documentation)
Creates a new issue with formatted analysis content
Includes key themes and patterns from the issues

evals.prompt: Do a product management analysis of open issues in tobegit3hub/OxMate and summarize findings in a new issue
evals.expected_output: A PM-style analysis issue is created with insights about the issue backlog, trends, and actionable recommendations
expectations: Fetches open issues from the correct repository
